_comment: INTENTIONAL FIXTURE — DO NOT FIX. This hooks.json pairs with bad-hook.sh to give hook-critic a complete non-blocking-contract context for its contract-detection rule. The leading `_comment` field intentionally documents the contract: 'hooks never block tool calls; always exit 0; warnings only.' This is the non-blocking signal language hook-critic greps for in Step 2 of contract detection. The bug is intentionally placed in the referenced script bad-hook.sh (set -e on a non-blocking contract + missing CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT); this config file itself is structurally valid so hook-critic focuses on the script's contract violation.
_contract: non-blocking — hooks never block tool calls, always exit 0, warning-only
